response.title: EdTech Engagement Specialist - Gamification Focus
response.description: We are seeking a passionate EdTech Engagement Specialist with a focus on gamification strategies to enhance student learning experiences. In this role, you will collaborate with educators and content creators to develop engaging, game-based learning modules that foster a dynamic educational environment. This is an exciting opportunity for someone looking to blend technology and education in innovative ways.

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Education, Game Design, or related field
